race.description: Ladbrokes Gatton Cup 27th June Class 2 Handicap
race.comment: ARDUOUS (3) is a distance specialist who is coming along nicely this prep. Finished fourth when fresh from a spell two starts back at Warwick then improved and scored as favourite over 1600m at this track two-and-a-half weeks ago, getting home by 1.75 lengths after being prominent at the turn. Suitably placed so anticipating another big run. BATTLESPACE (6) has not appeared since he got the cash over 1900m at Kilcoy on December 19. One to consider. PROPOSE (11) was beaten 2.5 lengths into fourth over 1500m at Warwick last time out. Well placed and can figure in the finish this time. SPIRIT OF NURAI (2) scored over 1600m at this track two back then missed the frame last time out over 1600m here. Can bounce back.
